CreateDataset.name: Dataset name; supports lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens; must start with a lowercase letter; must end with a lowercase letter or digit; length 1–50.
CreateDataset.storageInstance: Storage instance ID, corresponding to the ID of PFS or BOS.
CreateDataset.importFormat: Import format. FILE: file; FOLDER: folder.
CreateDataset.owner: Owner. Defaults to the creator if not specified.
CreateDataset.visibilityScope: Visibility scope. ALL_PEOPLE: visible to everyone; ONLY_OWNER: read/write by owner only; USER_GROUP: accessible to specified users/groups.
CreateDataset.visibilityUser.name: User or user group name.
CreateDataset.visibilityUser.permission: Permission. Enum: r: read-only; rw: read-write.
CreateDataset.visibilityGroup.name: User or user group name.
CreateDataset.visibilityGroup.permission: Permission. Enum: r: read-only; rw: read-write.
CreateDataset.initVersionEntry.id: Dataset version ID. Not required when creating a new version.
CreateDataset.initVersionEntry.version: Version number. Not required when creating a new version.
